name: Court Document Formatting
summary: Standard formatting requirements for court filings including captions, margins, fonts, and local rules compliance.
content:
# Court Document Formatting

## General Federal Requirements
- 8.5" x 11" paper
- 1" margins (all sides)
- 12-point font (Times New Roman or similar)
- Double-spaced body text
- Consecutively numbered pages
- Line numbers (many courts)

## Caption Elements
- Court name
- Case number
- Party names
- Document title

## Common Local Variations
- Page limits
- Font requirements
- E-filing specifications
- Certificate of service format
- Exhibit formatting

## Best Practices
- Always check local rules
- Review judge's individual practices
- Use court's preferred forms
- Include all required certifications
- Proofread caption details

## E-Filing Considerations
- PDF/A format often required
- File size limits
- Bookmarks for long documents
- OCR for scanned documents
